case_title: ADEL SHEIK VS. ACER INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO ACER INC.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACER INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-20-2009 AT 1:30PM. DEFENDANT ACER AMERICAN CORP. IS SUBSTITUTED IN ITS PLACE. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEIK, ADEL AS TO DEFENDANT OFFICE MAX INCORPORATED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-3009 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: QUEENA HO, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-22-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OFFICE MAX INCORPORATED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHEIK, ADEL AS TO DEFENDANT ACER INC. OFFICE MAX INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEIK, ADEL AS TO DEFENDANT ACER INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OFFICE MAX INCORPORATED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEIK, ADEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OFFICE MAX INCORPORATED ACER AMERICA CORP. $890.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $960.00, (DEFENDANT ACER INC. IS DISMISSED & AND DEFENDANT ACER AMERICA CORP IS SUBSTITUTED IN ITS PLACE. DEFENDANT ACER AMERICA CORP IS ORDERED TO CONTACT PLAINTIFF ADEL SHEIK TO ARRANGE FOR THE RETURN OF THE ACER COMPUTER. THE RETURN WILL BE MADE TO AN OFFICE MAX LOCATIO OF PLAINTIFF'S CHOICE. UPON RECEIPT OF THE ACER COMPUTER, DEFENDANT OFFICE MAX IS ORDERED TO PAY PLAINTIFF $890.00 FOR THE ORIGINAL PURCHASE PRICE OF THE COMPUTER ($550.00), PLUS SHIPPING COSTS FOR UNSUCCESSFUL REPAIR ($40.00), PLUS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT OFFICE MAX INCORPORATED ACER AMERICA CORP.
